textByHash.299f372886534e1fcd57471c1454271bd233013b: We knew this battle would come, ever since the day our king died. We've been prepared for a long time.
textByHash.3b72c9e7575f5f4cf23769a729d9be87578e3771: Before I will help you, you must complete this for me.
textByHash.82cfe47e37824490e454eb6f83011f81bb30fa5c: King Thoros and the Prifddinas Elders have agreed that we continue to maintain this outpost. We're now able to rotate our troops between here and Ardougne though, so they can spend more time with their families.
textByHash.ac47b2fae9e65615d258303a401d2b8224936854: And you friend. It will be an honour to fight against the darkness alongside you. Together, we can avenge King Tyras.
textByHash.f163d4b9868547a40df547baf81733b3dec1a53e: As do I. If it's not though, we'll make sure they remember us until the end of their days.
